answer:
The units place of an odd number can only be 1, 3, 5, 7, or 9 because odd numbers end in one of these digits. Therefore, no other digit can be the largest digit that is never found in the units place of an odd number.

So, there is no such digit.

Therefore, no answer. (Or, if you prefer, \boxed{0} as a "default" answer would not be correct in this case.)
